grant_title: Mental Health Grants in New Jersey
demographic_requirements: Varies by specific grant; some focus on under-resourced populations, children, adolescents, low-income seniors, returning citizens, immigrants, victims of domestic abuse, and veterans.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by grant but generally includes nonprofit organizations, 501(c)(3) entities, and sometimes specific demographic or geographic focus areas within New Jersey. Some grants require partnerships with local facilities or community organizations.
